G1.name: 基础设施
G1.description: Approval Gate 接线, Event Batch Drain (已有), Scroll 加速

G2.name: 渲染优化
G2.description: Per-message 缓存, Formatter 注册表, Tool Collapse

G3.name: 增强 Widgets
G3.description: StatusBar 重设计, Todo Panel, InputWidget 改进

G4.name: 品牌完善
G4.description: Welcome Panel ASCII Art + 呼吸动画

commits: 6e21f58 feat(tui): real-time tool folding, status bar brand/elapsed, ESC cancel preserves messages
f87b5d5 fix(tui): refresh git branch and dirty count every ~5 seconds
77c2297 feat(tui): auto-scroll to tool call when expanding, scroll to bottom when closing
features: Real-time tool result folding (ToolStart/ToolResult inline messages)
Status bar: brand, session elapsed, git status-based coloring
ESC cancel preserves partial streaming text as message
Periodic git refresh (~5s via tick counter)
Auto-scroll to tool call on Ctrl+O expand, scroll to bottom on close
System messages hidden from conversation area
Activity indicator row (thinking/streaming status + task tokens)

key_decisions: ApprovalGate: Arc<Mutex<HashMap>> oneshot 通道，TUI 调用 gate.respond()
Per-message cache: Vec<(u64, Vec<Line>)> 按消息位置索引，content hash 失效
ToolFormatter: Vec<Box<dyn ToolFormatter>> 顺序匹配 + GenericFormatter 兜底
Scroll: 3 级加速 (3/6/12 lines)，200ms 方向窗口
Tool Collapse: CC 风格，默认折叠，Ctrl+O 最近 / Alt+O 全局
Event Batch: while try_next() drain loop before render (Phase T 已实现)
Real-time tool folding: ToolStart flushes streaming text, ToolResult inserts inline messages
ESC cancel: cancelled flag prevents Completed from overwriting preserved messages
Git refresh: tick counter 83 ≈ 5s, refresh_git_info() runs git rev-parse + git status --porcelain
Scroll-to-tool: count messages after expanded tool × 2 lines estimate
StatusBar: brand + model + tokens + elapsed + context% (row 1), dir + git (row 2)
Activity indicator: separate 1-row widget between conversation and input
notes: Phase U COMPLETE + post-phase polish. 10/10 tasks + 3 polish commits. Merged feat/tui-opendev-integration → main. 2329 workspace tests, 456 octo-cli tests. Latest commit 77c2297.

deferred.description: Agent Debug Panel 重设计 — 信息整合到 StatusBar 后 Debug 面板需深入调整
deferred.precondition: Phase U G3 StatusBar 完成后

deferred.description: Agent Skills 系统是否符合标准规范 — 专题研究
